name: Lemon Sponge Pudding Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sugar, flour, and salt with the butter or margarine.
2. Add the lemon juice and zest to the mixture.
3. Stir in the beaten egg yolks and scalded milk.
4. Mix well until all ingredients are incorporated.
5. Gently fold in the stiffly beaten egg whites.
6. Pour the batter into a greased (one quart) casserole dish.
7. Bake in a larger pan of water at 325°F for 1 hour.
8. Cool and chill before serving.
Note: When done, there will be a meringue-like topping with a sponge cake center and a pudding-like consistency on the bottom. It cannot be unmolded.
